def positive_token_count_not_checked_before_api_call():
    rule_id = "token_count_not_checked_before_api_call"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "LLM requests are sent without visible token counting or context-window checks."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
